# claudeadmin_organization_members (Data Source)

Lists organization members with optional email filter.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "claudeadmin_organization_members" "by_email" {
  email = "alice@example.com"
}

data "claudeadmin_organization_members" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `email` (String) Filter results by user email (exact match).

### Read-Only

- `members` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--members))

<a id="nestedatt--members"></a>
### Nested Schema for `members`

Read-Only:

- `added_at` (String)
- `email` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `role` (String)
